title: Apple unveils innovative features and intelligence experiences across services
content: With the 2027 software releases coming this fall, Apple is bringing powerful new features to services users.
summary: With the 2027 software releases coming this fall, Apple is bringing powerful new features to services users.

title: Apple unveils next generation of Apple Intelligence, Siri AI, and more
content: Today, Apple previewed its upcoming software releases that will deliver the next generation of Apple Intelligence and introduce Siri AI.
summary: Today, Apple previewed its upcoming software releases that will deliver the next generation of Apple Intelligence and introduce Siri AI.

raw.title: Apple unveils next generation of Apple Intelligence, Siri AI, and more
raw.summary: Today, Apple previewed its upcoming software releases that will deliver the next generation of Apple Intelligence and introduce Siri AI.

title: Apple Intelligence brings powerful AI capabilities into everyday experiences
content: Apple unveils the next generation of Apple Intelligence, integrating powerful AI capabilities into iPhone, iPad, and Mac for more personal and helpful everyday experiences.
summary: Apple unveils the next generation of Apple Intelligence, integrating powerful AI capabilities into iPhone, iPad, and Mac for more personal and helpful everyday experiences.

raw.title: Apple Intelligence brings powerful AI capabilities into everyday experiences
raw.summary: Apple unveils the next generation of Apple Intelligence, integrating powerful AI capabilities into iPhone, iPad, and Mac for more personal and helpful everyday experiences.

title: Apple introduces Siri AI, a profoundly more capable and personal assistant
content: Apple introduces Siri AI, a profoundly more capable and personal assistant powered by Apple Intelligence, with personal context, world knowledge, and onscreen awareness.
summary: Apple introduces Siri AI, a profoundly more capable and personal assistant powered by Apple Intelligence, with personal context, world knowledge, and onscreen awareness.

raw.title: Apple introduces Siri AI, a profoundly more capable and personal assistant
raw.summary: Apple introduces Siri AI, a profoundly more capable and personal assistant powered by Apple Intelligence, with personal context, world knowledge, and onscreen awareness.

title: Due to DMA, Siri AI delayed in EU for iOS 27 and iPadOS 27
content: Due to the Digital Markets Act, Apple will not be able to ship Siri AI in the European Union with the release of iOS 27 and iPadOS 27.
summary: Due to the Digital Markets Act, Apple will not be able to ship Siri AI in the European Union with the release of iOS 27 and iPadOS 27.

raw.title: Due to DMA, Siri AI delayed in EU for iOS 27 and iPadOS 27
raw.summary: Due to the Digital Markets Act, Apple will not be able to ship Siri AI in the European Union with the release of iOS 27 and iPadOS 27.

title: Apple expands App Store capabilities to help developers grow and reach new users
content: New App Store capabilities will give developers more flexibility to market their apps, acquire users, and manage subscriptions.
summary: New App Store capabilities will give developers more flexibility to market their apps, acquire users, and manage subscriptions.

title: App Store ecosystem reaches $1.4 trillion as developers thrive globally
content: Apple today announced the global App Store ecosystem facilitated over $1.4 trillion in developer billings and sales in 2025.
summary: Apple today announced the global App Store ecosystem facilitated over $1.4 trillion in developer billings and sales in 2025.

raw.title: App Store ecosystem reaches $1.4 trillion as developers thrive globally
raw.summary: Apple today announced the global App Store ecosystem facilitated over $1.4 trillion in developer billings and sales in 2025.

title: The App Store stopped over $2.2 billion in fraudulent transactions in 2025
content: In 2025, Apple prevented over $2.2 billion in potentially fraudulent transactions, adding to a total of more than $11.2 billion in the past six years.
summary: In 2025, Apple prevented over $2.2 billion in potentially fraudulent transactions, adding to a total of more than $11.2 billion in the past six years.

title: Apple unveils new accessibility features, and updates with Apple Intelligence
content: Apple announced major accessibility updates powered by Apple Intelligence, including new capabilities for VoiceOver, Magnifier, and Voice Control.
summary: Apple announced major accessibility updates powered by Apple Intelligence, including new capabilities for VoiceOver, Magnifier, and Voice Control.
